name: Handan Chun (Zishu)
page_title: Handan Chun (Zishu) 邯鄲淳 (子叔) [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Sent to visit Cao Zhi and was greatly impressed by what he saw. A Confucian Exemplars.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	邯鄲淳 (子叔)


	 Pronunciation 
	Han2dan1 Chun2 (Zi3shu1)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Hándān Chún (Zǐshū)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Hantan Ch‘un (Tzŭ-shu)

	 Birthplace 
	Yongchuan

	 Other Names 
	Handan Zhu, Zishu (子叔), Zishu (子淑), Zili (子禮), Zhengli (正禮)

	 Name Notes 
	Also called Handan Zhu. He has multiple recorded style names, including Zishu (子叔), Zishu (子淑), Zili (子禮), and Zhengli (正禮). Some confusion may owe to mistranslation around zi (子), which introduces a style name.

full_text:
Handan Chun (Zishu) 邯鄲淳 (子叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Handan Chun (邯鄲淳), styledZishu (子叔), was born in Yongchuan. Sent to visit Cao Zhi and was greatly impressed by what he saw. A Confucian Exemplars. Handan Chun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
